name: Argvs
description: Instant sanctions screening API for AI agents. Screens names against OFAC SDN, OFAC Consolidated, EU, UN, and UK HMT sanctions lists using fuzzy matching.

tools.name: screen_sanctions
tools.description: Screen a single name against all international sanctions lists (OFAC, EU, UN, UK). Returns match confidence, risk level, and matched list details. Costs $0.03 per screen via MPP/Tempo.

name.description: The person or entity name to screen

type.description: Optional entity type to boost matching accuracy

country.description: Optional country to boost matching accuracy

tools.name: batch_screen_sanctions
tools.description: Screen multiple names against all international sanctions lists in a single request. Max 100 entities. Costs $0.02 per entity via MPP/Tempo.

name.description: The person or entity name to screen
